name: Ondo US Dollar Yield
description: USDY is a tokenized note issued under Ondo Global Markets for qualifying non-US investors. Depending on issuance date, USDY may be secured by short-term US Treasuries, shares of iShares Short Treasury Bond ETF, or bank demand deposits. USDY is designed as an accumulating token whose redemption value increases as yield accrues, with a rebasing version, rUSDY, also available.
subcategory: Tokenized note / yield-bearing U.S. Treasury product
